critical_findings.finding: Stage78 reference comparison is diagnostic, not a final apples-to-apples paper-protocol claim.
critical_findings.evidence: Stage75 uses full DAVIS val 30 sequences; Stage77/78 anchor-only rows use 4 scoped DAVIS val sequences.
critical_findings.required_action: Rerun our anchor/adapter pipeline on the same full DAVIS val paper-style protocol before final claims.

critical_findings.finding: Current middle-frame quality is far below the corrected StreamSplat/paper-level target.
critical_findings.evidence: q12 adapter gap4 middle gap=-4.748141051550093; q12 adapter gap8 middle gap=-4.490355146869977.
critical_findings.required_action: Run Stage143/144 to separate renderer/data/quantization/model causes, then train or add rate-counted side-info until middle PSNR recovers.
